title: TransactionLedgerEntry
description: Double-entry line item. One row per debit or credit on a transaction. Every transaction has AT LEAST TWO ledger entries with SUM(debit_cents) == SUM(credit_cents) > 0 (the double-entry invariant). Carries `tenant_id` only. IMMUTABLE after create. NEVER carries `application_id`, `region_id`, `organization_id`, `branch_id`, or `scope_node_id`.

tenant_id.description: Denormalised from transaction.tenant_id — explicit for query-plan + FK integrity + cross-tenant defense-in-depth.

transaction_id.description: Parent transaction. CASCADE — entries follow their parent through hard-purge (after archive to compliance-storage).

account.description: One of 14 LedgerAccount values (chart-of-accounts entry). See data/chart-of-accounts-catalog.json.

account_currency.description: ISO 4217 3-letter code. Must match the parent transaction currency (single-currency-per-transaction invariant — except for kind='currency_conversion' which is the ONE exception with mixed-currency entries).

debit_cents.description: Debit amount in cents. Non-negative. Exactly ONE of debit_cents / credit_cents is > 0 per row (debit XOR credit invariant).

credit_cents.description: Credit amount in cents. Non-negative. Exactly ONE of debit_cents / credit_cents is > 0 per row.

description.description: Auto-generated by TransactionRecorder from the parent transaction's kind + this account. Rendered on GL reports.

updated_by.note: Populated only during creation; refuses to update thereafter (append-only).

indexes.name: ledger_entries_debit_xor_credit_check
indexes.description: Database-level CHECK constraint enforcing the debit XOR credit invariant. Defense-in-depth alongside the debit_xor_credit rule + observer.

x-invariants: (debit_cents > 0 AND credit_cents = 0) OR (debit_cents = 0 AND credit_cents > 0) — debit XOR credit invariant

account_currency == parent transaction.currency (single-currency-per-transaction invariant; the ONE exception is kind='currency_conversion' where the two entries carry different account_currency values)
parent transaction.status = 'draft' when entry is being created (entries attach only during transaction creation, before post)
IMMUTABLE after create — no updates allowed on any field
the SUM(debit_cents) across all entries in a transaction equals the SUM(credit_cents) across all entries (asserted at post time by TransactionObserver::finalize())
